displayTitle: The Final Call: Code to Disposition

beats.narration: An indication is on screen and someone writes accept or reject. That word comes from a document — the code your contract names.

payload.title: THE FINAL CALL
payload.sub: The contract names the code and edition; the document decides.

beats.narration: Read the clause: scope, recording threshold, evaluation rules — and one bright line: cracks, lack of fusion, incomplete penetration reject at any amplitude.
Amplitude cannot classify; behavior can. Cracks stay ragged as you walk. Lack of fusion dies on a swivel. Slag survives it. Porosity travels low.
Location is trigonometry: sixty degrees, twenty millimeter plate, fifty-five millimeters soundpath — second leg, twelve and a half millimeters deep. Plotted: the fusion line.

payload.heading: Locate it: soundpath trigonometry
payload.note: SECOND LEG · 12.5 MM DEEP · FUSION LINE

beats.narration: The report must reconstruct the call without you in the room. Name the code. Show the math. The call will stand.

payload.sub: Years later, in front of an auditor.
